headline: Kinder Morgan Projects Monument Acquisition Into Next Phase Of Growth
summary: Kinder Morgan (NYSE:KMI) is acquiring Monument Pipeline for $505 million, expanding its U.S. natural gas pipeline footprint. The company is highlighting a growing shadow project backlog that it expects to advance meaningfully this year. Upcoming projects include the Gulf Coast Express pipeline expansion and South System Expansion 4, which are set to reshape its project slate. Kinder Morgan sits at the center of U.S. energy infrastructure, and these moves give investors new pieces to factor...
